dod_items_trace.text: O ranking informa ticket médio com semântica explícita.

residual_debt.description: scripts/reports/org_ranking.py and deliverable_orgaos_ranking.py do not emit ticket_medio_formula, zero_vs_not_consulted, data_quality_limitation, modalidades map, or frequencia_temporal. Schema module is fixture/audit-only (no DSN builder command).
residual_debt.recommendation: Add live builder path: DSN → OrgRankRow/DeliverableAReport, or extend org_ranking SQL to full schema then audit-file.

residual_debt.description: DoD L193 requires ranking of entes that contract works/services compatible with profile. Live SQL filters only UF/is_active — no profile object/CNAE/radius filter.
residual_debt.recommendation: Wire client profile filters into ranking queries; document coverage_notes when filter unavailable.

residual_debt.description: audit_report checks valor_semantica presence but not membership in {CONTRATADO, ESTIMADO, HOMOLOGADO}.
residual_debt.recommendation: Add enum validation check in audit_report.
Remove dead assignment or use in frequencia_temporal.

dod_flip_recommendation.reason: Schema/audit capability proven; live empty DSN honest INSUFFICIENT. Full DoD [x] would overclaim operational ranking of profile-compatible universe and live field parity. Leave L193-202 [ ] (or ledger PARTIAL) until live schema parity and/or explicit PO acceptance of schema-only PARTIAL with residual debt owners.

decision.rationale: All six mission verification criteria hold: HEAD on feature branch tip, unit tests map 1:1 and pycache confirms run, audit-fixture 10/10, live empty path honest INSUFFICIENT (no fake 95%), DoD section fully unchecked, zero/ticket/bias semantics correct on schema path. Residuals are medium live-wiring debt, not integrity failures or false greens. DoD flip still DENIED pending PO residual decision.
